channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals

item.title: Meet a smart trader (0x1342) on @Aster_DEX. 6 days ago, trader 0x1342 fearlessly went 4x long on 1.8M $SYN($951K) at $0.28. The position is now up $447K(+188%) in unrealized profit. https://www.asterd

item.title: RPC instability is a detection problem as much as an uptime one. We've run Smart Router in production because consistent reads matter when you're catching threats in real time. Good to see it open up
item.description: pRPC instability is a detection problem as much as an uptime one. We've run Smart Router in production because consistent reads matter when you're catching threats in real time. Good to see it open up further./phr /blockquotebMagma Devs (@magmadevs)/bppFinancial institutions are running on blockchai

item.title: There are a handful of quality Zoomer neologisms drifting around the discourse swamp, and “posting hole” may be the funniest and most spiritually accurate one. It hits rare linguistic perfection where
item.description: pThere are a handful of quality Zoomer neologisms drifting around the discourse swamp, and “posting hole” may be the funniest and most spiritually accurate one.br /br /It hits rare linguistic perfection where the phrase is devastatingly precise and embeds tacit ridicule in its simplicity.br /br /Som

item.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's spreads through the brain
item.description: A common brain protein may be giving Alzheimer’s disease an unexpected way to spread, carrying toxic Tau proteins from damaged neurons into healthy ones. By blocking these harmful protein packages before they reach new cells, researchers believe it may one day be possible to slow the disease's relen
